findings.summary: AIr server routes return inconsistent error shapes: some return { error: string }, others { ok: false, error: string }, with no shared error type
evidence: Line 322: return { ok: false, error: 'name is required' }
Line 370: return { ok: false, error: String(err) }
findings.suggestion: Define a shared ApiError type and use a consistent response envelope ({ ok: boolean, data?, error? }) across all routes

findings.summary: SDK client uses catch(err: any) in 3 places, losing type safety on error handling
findings.suggestion: Use catch(err: unknown) and narrow with instanceof Error or a type guard

findings.summary: Server routes cast req.query to any for parameter access instead of using Fastify's typed querystring schemas
findings.suggestion: Define Fastify route schemas with querystring types so req.query is properly typed without any casts

findings.summary: packages/hy-design-mcp/src/index.ts is a 1468-line god module containing RAG store, TF-IDF search, chunk builders, MCP tool definitions, and server bootstrap in one file
evidence: Mixes data access (RAG store), search algorithm (TF-IDF), domain logic (chunk builders), and transport (MCP server)
findings.suggestion: Split into modules: rag-store.ts (load/save), search.ts (TF-IDF), chunks.ts (sync/build), tools.ts (MCP tool definitions), index.ts (bootstrap)

findings.summary: docs/reference/ contains dashboard-03/ and sink/ with full React components that are not imported anywhere in the monorepo — dead reference code
evidence: grep for 'docs/reference' across all source files returns zero imports
Contains Next.js app router patterns in a non-Next.js monorepo
findings.suggestion: Move to a docs/archive/ folder or delete entirely — these appear to be copied reference implementations that are no longer used

findings.summary: AIr collector uses 'any' type assertions to access model properties and message content, bypassing TypeScript safety
findings.suggestion: Define proper interfaces for the collector message/model shapes and use type narrowing instead of any casts

findings.summary: DataGrid component uses 'any' for cell edit value types, losing type safety in the editing API
findings.suggestion: Use a generic type parameter on the edit cell interface: EditCellProps<T> with value: T and onSave: (value: T) => void

findings.summary: ContextMenu, DropdownMenu, and Menubar CSS files contain near-identical style definitions for items, separators, labels, and sub-triggers — tripled maintenance burden
evidence: All three define identical item hover, disabled, separator, and label styles
Shared styles exist at packages/hy-design-system/src/styles/menu-item.css.ts but are not fully utilized
findings.suggestion: Extract all shared menu styles into the existing menu-item.css.ts and compose them in each component's CSS file

findings.summary: BFF server has JWT dependency installed but no auth middleware registered — /health is the only route and it's unprotected (acceptable for now, but JWT setup is cargo-culted)
evidence: package.json lists @fastify/jwt, @fastify/helmet, @fastify/rate-limit but none are imported in server.ts
findings.suggestion: Either add auth middleware when real routes are added, or remove unused security dependencies to avoid false sense of security

findings.summary: AIr server exposes all API routes without any authentication — any client on the network can read telemetry, register providers, and send events
evidence: CORS origin: true allows all origins
No auth middleware on any route
Provider registration (POST /api/rag/provider) has no access control
findings.suggestion: Add optional API key auth via AIR_API_KEY env var with middleware that validates Bearer token on write routes

findings.summary: Server index uses (event as any).source and (event as any).serverName to extract provider info from events instead of extending the TelemetryEvent type
findings.suggestion: Add source and serverName to TelemetryEvent type or create typed event subtypes for RAG and MCP events

findings.summary: AIr CLI and start.ts hardcode localhost in user-facing output instead of using the actual bound host/port
findings.suggestion: Use the actual host/port from the Fastify server.addresses() after listen completes

findings.summary: Component preview pages use extensive inline style objects instead of vanilla-extract styles, inconsistent with the design system's CSS-in-TS conventions
evidence: DashboardPage.tsx uses inline style={{ }} for layout throughout instead of .css.ts file
Mixed pattern: some pages have .css.ts files but still use heavy inline styles
findings.suggestion: Move layout styles to the corresponding .css.ts files; reserve inline styles only for truly dynamic values

findings.summary: DataGrid core.ts is 891 lines with 13 exported/internal functions handling state, columns, rows, filtering, sorting, pagination, grouping, and editing — too many responsibilities
evidence: Mixes column resolution, row model building, sorting, filtering, pagination, and state management
findings.suggestion: Split into: state.ts (state management), columns.ts (resolution), row-models/ (filtering, sorting, pagination as separate files)

findings.summary: Server uses Math.random() for generating UIDs — not cryptographically secure and collision-prone at scale
findings.suggestion: Use crypto.randomUUID() (Node 19+) or import { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto'

findings.summary: apps/hy-component-preview/src/cards/ is a flat directory with 20+ demo card files with no subdirectory organization
evidence: 20+ card components in one flat directory
Cards span different feature areas (buttons, inputs, avatars, spinners) without grouping
findings.suggestion: Group cards into subdirectories by feature area: buttons/, inputs/, layout/, etc.

root_causes: AIr server grew organically without API typing discipline — all query params are any-cast
Design MCP was built as a single-file prototype and never decomposed
Menu component CSS was copy-pasted from shadcn without extracting shared patterns
likely_symptoms: preview-cards-flat-dir is cosmetic, not a defect
bff-no-auth-middleware is acceptable for a stub server
possible_false_positives: preview-page-inline-styles may be intentional for demo flexibility
